Normal Attacks.name: Standing Light Punch
Normal Attacks.notes: Requires at least 1 Drink to use Taret Combo, 1 Drink data listed in bracket.

Normal Attacks.name: Standing Heavy Punch
Normal Attacks.notes: As of March 2026 patch: expanded hitbox on final hit upwards.

Normal Attacks.name: Standing Medium Kick
Normal Attacks.notes: Hurtbox expanded after active frames on June 2025 patch.

Normal Attacks.name: Standing Heavy Kick
Normal Attacks.notes: Crumple of +71 on Punish Counter. Limited Juggle State on anti-air hit. As of December 2024 patch: "Reduced the hurtbox on the front legs during the attack's start up" was reported in the official patch notes... however, the hurtbox reduction is actually on his **hands** and on frames 5-8. Additionally, the move now has Anti-air invulnerability on frame 14 (1 frame before first active), which it did not have before. Advantage on hit changed from +1 to +3 in June 2025 patch.

Normal Attacks.name: Crouching Medium Punch
Normal Attacks.notes: As of June 2025 patch: hurtbox on feet increased vertically (to the top) on frames 16-17 on whiff. Feet hurtbox removed on frames 16-17 on hit/block.

Normal Attacks.name: Crouching Heavy Punch
Normal Attacks.notes: As of June 2025 patch: startup reduced from 9 frames to 8 frames.

Normal Attacks.name: Crouching Light Kick
Normal Attacks.notes: As of March 2026 patch: +3 on hit.

Normal Attacks.name: Crouching Medium Kick
Normal Attacks.notes: 20% damage scaling to followup combo hits. As of March 2026 patch: attack hitbox expanded forward.

Normal Attacks.name: Crouching Heavy Kick
Normal Attacks.notes: On block, the second hit changes to a high attack as of May 2024 patch.

Unique Attacks.name: Forward + Medium Kick (Falling Star Kick)
Unique Attacks.notes: At 2 Drinks, can Target Combo (no other changes to data).

Unique Attacks.name: Back + Heavy Punch (Hermit's Elbow)
Unique Attacks.notes: At 3 Drinks, can Target Combo (no other changes to data).

Unique Attacks.name: Forward + Heavy Kick (Senei Kick)
Unique Attacks.notes: At 4 Drinks, can Target Combo, 4 Drinks data listed in bracket.

Target Combos.name: Down + Heavy Kick, Heavy Kick, Punch
Target Combos.notes: Third "hit" is a cancel into Drink.

Target Combos.name: Light Punch, Light Kick, Medium Punch (Bitter Strikes)
Target Combos.notes: Requires at least 1 Drink to use, data listed at 1 Drink.

Target Combos.name: Forward + Medium Kick, Medium Kick, Punch (Full Moon Kick)
Target Combos.notes: Requires at least 2 Drinks to use, data listed at 2 Drinks. As of June 2025 patch: no longer drinks if kick button is held after 2nd attack hits.

Target Combos.name: Back + Heavy Punch, Heavy Punch, Heavy Kick (Intoxicated Assault)
Target Combos.notes: Requires at least 3 Drinks to use, data listed at 3 Drinks. Second hit only combos on meaty or counter hit.

Target Combos.name: Forward + Heavy Kick, Back + Heavy Kick, Punch (Ransui Haze)
Target Combos.cancel: Close: Special, Super Middle: Special, Super
Target Combos.notes: Requires 4 Drinks to use, data listed at 4 Drinks. B+HK sways backward for at least 25 frames after the first hit, then Punch activates a different followup based on range: Close is a Headbutt, Middle is a spinning triple punch, and Far is a Drink.

Jump Attacks.name: Jump Medium Punch
Jump Attacks.notes: Limited Juggle State on air hit.

Jump Attacks.name: Jump Heavy Kick
Jump Attacks.notes: As of December 2024 patch: now gives limited juggle state on all air-to-air hits.

Special Moves.name: The Devil Inside
Special Moves.notes: Grants 1 Drink. In a Counter-Hit state for duration. Can be held to continue drinking.All of Jamie's normal and special attacks start at 90% Damage scaling with 0 Drinks. Each Drink increases the scaling by 5%, so: 1 Drink: 95% / 2 Drinks: 100% / 3 Drinks: 105% / 4 Drinks: 110%. Additionally, each Drink unlocks a new Target Combo and a new Special Move. At 4 Drinks, some of his Special Moves change as well. Drinking again while at 4 Drinks will instead generate Drive Gauge. No Overdrive version.

Special Moves.name: Freeflow Strikes (First Hit)
Special Moves.notes: Data listed as "Light Punch / Medium Punch / Heavy Punch / Overdrive"Is a Rekka style attack, so can be followed up with Forward + Punch once or twice (data for each followup is listed as a separate entry).

Special Moves.name: Freeflow Strikes > Punch Followup 1
Special Moves.notes: Data listed as "Light Punch / Medium Punch / Heavy Punch / Overdrive"

Special Moves.name: Freeflow Strikes > Punch Followup 2
Special Moves.on_hit: 0-3 Drinks: Knockdown +27 / KD +27 / KD +27 / KD +28 4 Drinks: Knockdown +27 / KD +27 / KD +27 / KD +28
Special Moves.notes: Data listed as "Light Punch / Medium Punch / Heavy Punch / Overdrive". Third hit always scales to 72% (396 / 432 / 468 / 540). 4 Drinks version does more scaling, I'll farm that data out sometime when I hate myself more. June 2025 patch: 20% followup scaling added to normal, 25% followup scaling added to Overdrive version -- but can cancel into Level 3 now.

Special Moves.name: Freeflow Strikes > Kick Followup 1
Special Moves.notes: Kick stregnth does not change data, it is based off of the originating Punch from Freeflow Strikes. Data listed as "Light Punch / Medium Punch / Heavy Punch / Overdrive".

Special Moves.name: Freeflow Strikes > Kick Followup 2
Special Moves.notes: Kick stregnth does not change data, it is based off of the originating Punch from Freeflow Strikes. Data listed as "Light Punch / Medium Punch / Heavy Punch / Overdrive". Third hit always scales to 72% (324 / 360 / 396 / 432). Transitioning into 4 Drinks gives better advantage, listed in brackets.

Special Moves.name: Swagger Step > Swagger Hermit Punch
Special Moves.notes: Requires 4 Drinks to use. Limited Juggle Potential. Data listed as "Light Punch / Medium Punch / Heavy Punch / Overdrive". Overdrive version does less damage.

Special Moves.name: Arrow Kick (Light Kick)
Special Moves.notes: Anti-air invincible on frames 1-11. Lower Body invincible on frames 5-22. As of June 2025 patch: active frames from 7 to 10, recovery from 54 to 52 (undocumented: 1 frame less Anti-air invincibility, 1 more frame more Lower Body invinciblity).

Special Moves.name: Arrow Kick (Medium Kick)
Special Moves.notes: Anti-air invincible on frames 1-14, Lower Body invincible on frames 8-23. As of June 2025 patch: active frames from 7 to 9, recovery from 53 to 51.

Special Moves.name: Arrow Kick (Heavy Kick)
Special Moves.notes: Anti-air invincible on frames 1-16, Lower Body invincible on frames 10-25. As of June 2025 patch: active frames from 7 to 9, recovery from 53 to 51.

Special Moves.name: Arrow Kick (Overdrive)
Special Moves.notes: Fully invincibile on frames 1-9. Anti-air invincible on frames 10-12, Lower Body invincible on frames 10-21.

Special Moves.name: Luminous Dive Kick
Special Moves.notes: Requires 1 Drink to use. Kick strength changes trajectory. Active until landing. Overdrive causes a Limited Juggle State, data in parenthesis. Air to air hit: Normal versions force knockdown, Overdrive version gives ground bounce Limited Juggle State.

Special Moves.name: Bakkai (Light Kick)
Special Moves.notes: Requires 2 Drinks to use. Projectile invincible on frames 3-24.

Special Moves.name: Bakkai (Medium Kick)
Special Moves.notes: Requires 2 Drinks to use. Projectile invincible on frames 4-26.

Special Moves.name: Bakkai (Heavy Kick)
Special Moves.notes: Requires 2 Drinks to use. Projectile invincible on frames 5-35.

Special Moves.name: Bakkai (Overdrive)
Special Moves.notes: Requires 2 Drinks to use. Projectile invincible on frames 3-28. As of March 2026 patch: startup from 21 to 18 frames, active frames of first hit from 3 to 6, etc.

Special Moves.name: Tenshin
Special Moves.notes: Requires 3 Drinks to use. A command grab that gives a free followup attack. Attack strength does not change data. Waiting after an Overdrive hit causes a delayed crumple into Limited Juggle State. Overdrive data in parenthesis.

Super Arts.name: Breakin' (Level 1)
Super Arts.notes: Strike/throw invincible on frames 1-11. Breaks armor. Can hold Down during animation to decrease damage but take a Drink at the end (data in parenthesis).

Super Arts.name: The Devil's Song (Level 2)
Super Arts.notes: Temporarily enables 4 Drinks for the duration of the timer, but at only 105% strength for attacks (real 4 Drinks is 110%). If used when Jamie already has 4 Drinks, will instead refill 3 Drive Bars or 50% of Burnout Gauage. In February 27, 2024 patch: no longer removes drinks on ending (yay!).

Super Arts.name: Getsuga Saiho (Level 3)
Super Arts.notes: Fully invincible on frames 1-11. Breaks armor. Critical Art in parenthesis. Non-CA version launches into a Free Juggle State on hit.

Misc..name: Forward Throw
Misc..notes: Can hold throw to add a drink to the throw (added in February 27, 2024 patch). Data in parenthesis.
